passiveAbilities.name: Woodfoot
passiveAbilities.description: This character may jog over Wooded Patches.

passiveAbilities.name: Ponderous
passiveAbilities.description: This character cannot take Reaction Steps.

passiveAbilities.name: Knotted Branches
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2.

passiveAbilities.name: Bark Skin
passiveAbilities.description: If this character suffers Piercing or Slicing Dmg, reduce the Dmg suffered by -1.

passiveAbilities.name: Forest
passiveAbilities.description: After this character suffers Dmg, it may restore 1 Wd for each Wooded Patch within 4".

arcaneAbilities.name: Call of the Woods
arcaneAbilities.description:
Move target enemy X+2" directly towards any friendly Treefolk. Then target suffers 1 Wd for each Wooded Patch within 4" of it.
Catastrophe: This model cannot move or be moved and has its melee range increased to 3" until end of turn.

signatureMove.name: Rooted
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If this character was not slain then it restores 1 Wd.
signatureMove.extraText: This model cannot be move of be moved and has its Melee Range increased to 3" until end of the current activation.
